# Pull request template

## What does this PR change?

<!-- 1-2 sentence summary. e.g. "Adds a /blog route with three initial posts and a card-grid index." -->

## Why?

<!-- The motivation. What problem does this solve? Link to an issue if applicable: "Closes #12" -->

## What type of change is this?

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 🎨 Design / copy / brand update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] 📝 Docs / README / config
- [ ] 🚀 Deployment / CI / tooling

## Which sections are affected?

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Hero
- [ ] Stats bar
- [ ] The Why (`#why`)
- [ ] The Who (`#who`)
- [ ] The How (`#how`)
- [ ] The Flow (`#flow`)
- [ ] The What / Services (`#what`)
- [ ] Dashboard (`#dashboard`)
- [ ] Testimonials (`#founders`)
- [ ] Pricing (`#pricing`)
- [ ] Final CTA
- [ ] Footer
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Mobile responsive
- [ ] Other: <!-- specify -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For visual changes, drop a before/after screenshot or a Loom link. Visual review is required for any change a visitor would see. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes locally with no errors
- [ ] No console errors or warnings in the browser when running `bun run dev`
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport (375px wide) — layout holds, no overflow
- [ ] Tested on desktop viewport (1440px wide) — layout holds, no overflow
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal tokens in the diff
- [ ] If new dependencies were added, they're listed in the PR description with a justification
- [ ] If copy was changed, it follows the brand voice (warm, plain-spoken, human — never corporate or "AI"-coded)

## Notes for the reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay extra attention to? Anything you're unsure about? -->
